# services.ferretdb

<!-- AUTO-GENERATED by scripts/nix-options.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

All options under `services.ferretdb`.

| Option | Type | Description |
| --- | --- | --- |
| `services.ferretdb.enable` | `boolean` | Whether to enable FerretDB, an Open Source MongoDB alternative. |
| `services.ferretdb.package` | `package` | The ferretdb package to use. |
| `services.ferretdb.settings` | `open submodule of attribute set of string` | Additional configuration for FerretDB, see <https://docs.ferretdb.io/configuration/flags/> for supported values. |
| `services.ferretdb.settings.FERRETDB_HANDLER` | `one of "sqlite", "pg"` | Backend handler |
| `services.ferretdb.settings.FERRETDB_POSTGRESQL_URL` | `string` | PostgreSQL URL for 'pg' handler |
| `services.ferretdb.settings.FERRETDB_SQLITE_URL` | `string` | SQLite URI (directory) for 'sqlite' handler |
| `services.ferretdb.settings.FERRETDB_TELEMETRY` | `one of "enable", "disable"` | Enable or disable basic telemetry. See <https://docs.ferretdb.io/telemetry/> for more information. |
